overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a stormy night on a rocky coastline. The camera, from a first-person perspective, overlooks a dark sea with distant lights on the horizon while lightning periodically illuminates heavy storm clouds overhead. The footage transitions from a ground-level view of the shoreline to a skyward view of the tempest.

events.description: camera begins tilting upward from the shoreline toward the storm clouds

agents.ego_description: standing on rocky shore observing the approaching storm over the water

entered.detail: dark rocky terrain in the foreground with uneven surfaces
silhouetted evergreen tree against the stormy sky
dark heavy storm clouds covering most of the sky
faint lights visible on the distant horizon across the water
choppy dark water stretching to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rocky coastline at night during a heavy storm. The camera stands on uneven rocky ground with a pine tree visible to the right, looking out over dark choppy waters toward distant lights on the horizon. Heavy storm clouds dominate the sky as the camera begins to tilt upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open stormy sky over coastal waters

events.description: bright lightning bolt strikes the left side of the frame illuminating the storm clouds
lightning flash visible in the distant clouds

agents.ego_description: panning camera upward to track the storm clouds and lightning activity

segments.scene_description: As the camera tilts upward, the rocky shore and tree exit the frame, revealing a full view of the turbulent storm clouds over the dark sea. A bright lightning bolt strikes the left side at 22 seconds, briefly illuminating the scene, followed by another distant flash. The distant lights remain visible on the horizon throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: stormy night sky over open ocean

events.description: multiple lightning strikes illuminate the cloudscape simultaneously
distant lightning flash appears on the right side of the horizon

agents.ego_description: continuing to observe the lightning storm, slowly panning across the dark turbulent sky

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses entirely on the stormy sky over the ocean, with the camera slowly panning across the dark clouds. Multiple lightning strikes illuminate the scene at 40 seconds, creating a dramatic display of the storm's intensity. The distant horizon lights remain faintly visible as the tempest continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that shifts from a grounded perspective on a stormy coastline to an immersive view of a tempestuous sky. It begins on uneven rocky ground beside a pine tree, looking out over dark, choppy waters toward distant lights on the horizon. As the camera tilts upward, the shoreline and tree exit the frame to reveal a full expanse of turbulent storm clouds over the sea, punctuated by a bright lightning bolt that briefly illuminates the darkness. The scene then expands into a slow pan across the heavy clouds, where multiple lightning strikes create a dramatic display of intensity. Finally, the camera lingers on the stormy heavens while the distant horizon lights remain faintly visible beneath the raging tempest.
